steps.title: Web service - Front service
steps.subtitle: Set your protected hostname and TLS mode.

steps.subtitle: Enable the mitchellkrogza community UA list and block PHP injection strings, AI/LLM crawlers (GPTBot, Claude, CCBot...), security scanners (Censys, RecordedFuture...) and generic HTTP clients.
